title: Open a Bank Account
prompt: Practice how to open a bank account by speaking to a bank teller. Use the phrase: 'I would like to open an account, please.'
hint: Remember to mention you want to open an account politely and be ready to provide your ID and address.
sample: Hello, I would like to open an account, please. Here is my passport and my address.

ja.prompt: 銀行の窓口で口座を開設する練習をしましょう。「I would like to open an account, please.」というフレーズを使ってください。
ja.hint: 口座を開設したいことを丁寧に伝え、身分証明書と住所を用意しましょう。
ja.sample: Hello, I would like to open an account, please. Here is my passport and my address.

zh.prompt: 練習如何向銀行櫃員開設銀行帳戶。使用句子：'I would like to open an account, please.'
zh.hint: 記得禮貌地說明你想開戶，並準備好提供身份證和地址。
zh.sample: Hello, I would like to open an account, please. Here is my passport and my address.

title: Make a Deposit
prompt: Practice telling the bank teller you want to put money into your account. Use the phrase: 'I would like to make a deposit, please.'
hint: Use polite language and clearly say you want to deposit money.
sample: Good morning, I would like to make a deposit, please. Here is $200.

ja.prompt: 銀行の窓口でお金を預けたいと伝える練習をしましょう。「I would like to make a deposit, please.」というフレーズを使ってください。
ja.hint: 丁寧な言葉遣いで、預金したいことをはっきり伝えましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning, I would like to make a deposit, please. Here is $200.

zh.prompt: 練習告訴銀行櫃員你想存錢。使用句子：'I would like to make a deposit, please.'
zh.hint: 使用禮貌用語，清楚說明你想存錢。
zh.sample: Good morning, I would like to make a deposit, please. Here is $200.

title: Make a Withdrawal
prompt: Practice asking the bank teller to take money out of your account. Use the phrase: 'I would like to make a withdrawal, please.' or 'I would like to take out some cash, please.'
hint: You can use either the formal or simpler phrase to ask for cash.
sample: Hello, I would like to take out some cash, please. Could I have $50?

ja.prompt: 銀行の窓口でお金を引き出したいと伝える練習をしましょう。「I would like to make a withdrawal, please.」または「I would like to take out some cash, please.」というフレーズを使ってください。
ja.hint: 正式な表現か簡単な表現、どちらでも使えます。
ja.sample: Hello, I would like to take out some cash, please. Could I have $50?

zh.prompt: 練習請銀行櫃員幫你提款。使用句子：'I would like to make a withdrawal, please.' 或 'I would like to take out some cash, please.'
zh.hint: 你可以使用正式或簡單的句子來請求現金。
zh.sample: Hello, I would like to take out some cash, please. Could I have $50?

title: Use the ATM
prompt: Practice describing how to use an ATM to withdraw money. Include inserting your card, entering your pin, and selecting the amount.
hint: Remember to mention your bank card and secret pin number.
sample: I insert my bank card into the ATM, enter my pin number, and select the amount of cash I want to withdraw.

ja.prompt: ATMでお金を引き出す方法を説明する練習をしましょう。カードを入れて、暗証番号を入力し、金額を選ぶことを含めてください。
ja.hint: 銀行カードと秘密の暗証番号を言うのを忘れないでください。
ja.sample: I insert my bank card into the ATM, enter my pin number, and select the amount of cash I want to withdraw.

zh.prompt: 練習描述如何使用ATM提款。包括插入卡片、輸入密碼和選擇金額。
zh.hint: 記得提到你的銀行卡和秘密密碼。
zh.sample: I insert my bank card into the ATM, enter my pin number, and select the amount of cash I want to withdraw.

title: Exchange Currency at the Bank
prompt: Practice asking the bank teller to exchange money for a different currency. Use the phrase: 'I would like to exchange some money, please.'
hint: Mention the currency you want to exchange to, like euros or pounds.
sample: Hello, I would like to exchange some money, please. I want euros.

ja.prompt: 銀行の窓口で外貨両替をお願いする練習をしましょう。「I would like to exchange some money, please.」というフレーズを使ってください。
ja.hint: ユーロやポンドなど、交換したい通貨を伝えましょう。
ja.sample: Hello, I would like to exchange some money, please. I want euros.

zh.prompt: 練習請銀行櫃員幫你兌換外幣。使用句子：'I would like to exchange some money, please.'
zh.hint: 提到你想兌換的貨幣，例如歐元或英鎊。
zh.sample: Hello, I would like to exchange some money, please. I want euros.

title: Talk About Bank Account Types
prompt: Explain the difference between a checking account and a savings account in English.
hint: Checking accounts are for daily spending; savings accounts are for saving money for the future.
sample: A checking account is for everyday spending, like buying coffee. A savings account is for saving money for things like vacations or emergencies.

ja.prompt: 普通預金口座と貯蓄口座の違いを英語で説明しましょう。
ja.hint: 普通預金は日常の支払い用、貯蓄口座は将来のための貯金用です。
ja.sample: A checking account is for everyday spending, like buying coffee. A savings account is for saving money for things like vacations or emergencies.

zh.prompt: 用英文解釋支票帳戶和儲蓄帳戶的差別。
zh.hint: 支票帳戶用於日常消費；儲蓄帳戶用於未來存錢。
zh.sample: A checking account is for everyday spending, like buying coffee. A savings account is for saving money for things like vacations or emergencies.

title: Report a Lost Bank Card
prompt: Practice telling the bank you lost your card and need help. Use the phrase: 'I lost my card. Please cancel it immediately.'
hint: Be clear and ask for immediate action to protect your money.
sample: Hello, I lost my card. Please cancel it immediately to keep my account safe.

ja.prompt: カードをなくしたことを銀行に伝え、助けを求める練習をしましょう。「I lost my card. Please cancel it immediately.」というフレーズを使ってください。
ja.hint: はっきり伝え、すぐに対応してもらうように頼みましょう。
ja.sample: Hello, I lost my card. Please cancel it immediately to keep my account safe.

zh.prompt: 練習告訴銀行你遺失了卡片並需要幫助。使用句子：'I lost my card. Please cancel it immediately.'
zh.hint: 說清楚並請求立即處理以保護你的錢。
zh.sample: Hello, I lost my card. Please cancel it immediately to keep my account safe.

title: Check Your Account Balance
prompt: Practice asking about your account balance politely. Use the phrase: 'Could you please tell me my account balance?'
hint: Use polite language when asking for your balance at the bank or online.
sample: Hello, could you please tell me my account balance?

ja.prompt: 口座残高を丁寧に尋ねる練習をしましょう。「Could you please tell me my account balance?」というフレーズを使ってください。
ja.hint: 銀行やオンラインで残高を聞くときは丁寧な言葉遣いをしましょう。
ja.sample: Hello, could you please tell me my account balance?

zh.prompt: 練習禮貌地詢問你的帳戶餘額。使用句子：'Could you please tell me my account balance?'
zh.hint: 在銀行或線上詢問餘額時使用禮貌用語。
zh.sample: Hello, could you please tell me my account balance?
